title: Toast
description: Transient feedback message. Avoid stealing focus; ensure screen reader announcement is appropriate.

props.name: duration
props.description: Auto-dismiss time in ms (0 disables auto-dismiss).

keyboard: If a toast contains an action button, it must be reachable by keyboard without disrupting user flow excessively.
aria: Use aria-live="polite" for neutral/success; consider aria-live="assertive" only for critical errors.
Ensure close button has an accessible name.

must: Toast content must be readable and not rely on color alone.
Toasts must not block primary interactions.
should: Limit to one or few visible toasts; queue additional messages.
Provide an action for recoverable errors (optional).
must_not: Do not use toasts for long-form content or required confirmations.

token_usage.notes: Use surface background for neutral toast.
Use overlay shadow if toast overlays content.
